whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
paragraphs: Film Industry MP is a specialized film facilitation network platform, focused on connecting national and international production houses with the right local resources across Madhya Pradesh.

We act as a reliable bridge between filmmakers and on-ground professionals by identifying and providing verified, city-specific experts who can efficiently manage and execute film-related requirements.

Our services include facilitation support for Celebrity Management, Movie Promotion, Theatre Advertisement, Line Production, Location Scouting, Government Permissions, and overall production coordination — all through trusted local partners.
Rather than direct execution, Film Industry MP focuses on building a strong ecosystem by ensuring that every project gets access to the right people, in the right location, at the right time.

keyInitiatives: Providing city-wise verified film facilitation professionals across Madhya Pradesh
Connecting production houses with local experts for smooth on-ground execution
Offering guidance on location feasibility, coordination, and permission processes through local partners
Supporting filmmakers in accessing regional resources quickly and efficiently

whatWeDo.title: What We Do
items: Facilitate film shootings across Madhya Pradesh
Assist with MP film subsidy and incentives
Offer locations, crew, artists, and logistics
Promote MP culture and heritage through cinema
